mapper.select: SELECT * FROM crm_contract WHERE deleted = 0 AND contract_no = #{contractNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_contract WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(contract_amount), 0) FROM crm_contract WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 'APPROVED' AND MONTH(sign_date) = MONTH(CURRENT_DATE()) AND YEAR(sign_date) = YEAR(CURRENT_DATE())
